tEn: Every FLOP Counts: Scaling a 300B Mixture-of-Experts LING LLM without Premium GPUs
tZh: 每一份算力都至关重要：在没有高端GPU的情况下扩展一个300B参数的混合专家LING大语言模型
sEn: We demonstrate that a 300B MoE LLM can be effectively trained on lower-performance devices with comparable performance and 20% cost savings.
sZh: 我们证明了一个300B参数的混合专家大语言模型可以在低性能设备上有效训练，性能与同类模型相当，且计算成本降低约20%。
absEn: In this technical report, we tackle the challenges of training large-scale Mixture of Experts (MoE) models, focusing on overcoming cost inefficiency and resource limitations prevalent in such systems. To address these issues, we present two differently sized MoE large language models (LLMs), namely Ling-Lite and Ling-Plus (referred to as "Bailing" in Chinese, spelled Bǎilíng in Pinyin). Ling-Lite contains 16.8 billion parameters with 2.75 billion activated parameters, while Ling-Plus boasts 290 billion parameters with 28.8 billion activated parameters. Both models exhibit comparable performance to leading industry benchmarks. This report offers actionable insights to improve the efficiency and accessibility of AI development in resource-constrained settings, promoting more scalable and sustainable technologies. Specifically, to reduce training costs for large-scale MoE models, we propose innovative methods for (1) optimization of model architecture and training processes, (2) refinement of training anomaly handling, and (3) enhancement of model evaluation efficiency. Additionally, leveraging high-quality data generated from knowledge graphs, our models demonstrate superior capabilities in tool use compared to other models. Ultimately, our experimental findings demonstrate that a 300B MoE LLM can be effectively trained on lower-performance devices while achieving comparable performance to models of a similar scale, including dense and MoE models. Compared to high-performance devices, utilizing a lower-specification hardware system during the pre-training phase demonstrates significant cost savings, reducing computing costs by approximately 20%. The models can be accessed at https://huggingface.co/inclusionAI.
absZh: 在本技术报告中，我们解决了训练大规模混合专家（MoE）模型的挑战，重点关注克服此类系统中普遍存在的成本低效和资源限制问题。为此，我们提出了两个不同规模的MoE大语言模型（LLM），即Ling-Lite和Ling-Plus（中文名为“百灵”，拼音为Bǎilíng）。Ling-Lite包含168亿参数，其中27.5亿被激活；Ling-Plus拥有2900亿参数，其中288亿被激活。两个模型均表现出与行业领先基准相当的性能。本报告提供了可操作的见解，以提高资源受限环境下AI开发的效率和可及性，促进更可扩展和可持续的技术。具体而言，为降低大规模MoE模型的训练成本，我们提出了创新方法：（1）优化模型架构和训练过程，（2）改进训练异常处理，（3）提升模型评估效率。此外，利用从知识图谱生成的高质量数据，我们的模型在工具使用方面表现出优于其他模型的能力。最终，我们的实验结果表明，一个300B参数的MoE大语言模型可以在低性能设备上有效训练，同时达到与类似规模模型（包括密集模型和MoE模型）相当的性能。与高性能设备相比，在预训练阶段使用低规格硬件系统可显著节省成本，计算成本降低约20%。模型可在https://huggingface.co/inclusionAI获取。

contrib.en: Proposes innovative methods to reduce training costs for large-scale MoE models, including optimization of architecture, training processes, anomaly handling, and evaluation efficiency.
contrib.zh: 提出创新方法降低大规模MoE模型训练成本，包括架构优化、训练流程、异常处理和评估效率。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that a 300B MoE LLM can be effectively trained on lower-performance devices, achieving comparable performance to similar-scale models with ~20% cost savings.
contrib.zh: 证明300B MoE大语言模型可在低性能设备上有效训练，性能与同规模模型相当，成本节省约20%。

contrib.en: Introduces Ling-Lite (16.8B total, 2.75B activated) and Ling-Plus (290B total, 28.8B activated) MoE models with competitive performance.
contrib.zh: 推出Ling-Lite（总参数量16.8B，激活参数量2.75B）和Ling-Plus（总参数量290B，激活参数量28.8B）MoE模型，性能具有竞争力。

contrib.en: Develops XPUTimer, a lightweight debugging tool achieving 90% memory reduction for performance analysis in heterogeneous training.
contrib.zh: 开发XPUTimer轻量级调试工具，在异构训练中实现90%内存减少用于性能分析。

contrib.en: Implements EDiT asynchronous training strategy, reducing training time by up to 66.1% in heterogeneous environments.
contrib.zh: 实现EDiT异步训练策略，在异构环境中训练时间最多减少66.1%。

contrib.en: Enhances tool use capability via knowledge graph-based high-quality data synthesis and adaptive tool learning.
contrib.zh: 通过基于知识图谱的高质量数据合成和自适应工具学习增强工具使用能力。

limits.en: Training stability issues such as loss spikes and expert load imbalance persist despite mitigation strategies.
limits.zh: 尽管有缓解策略，训练稳定性问题如损失尖峰和专家负载不平衡仍然存在。

limits.en: Cross-platform alignment remains challenging due to accumulated precision errors across heterogeneous hardware.
limits.zh: 跨平台对齐仍具挑战，因异构硬件上精度误差累积。

limits.en: The study focuses on MoE models; findings may not generalize to dense architectures or other model families.
limits.zh: 研究聚焦MoE模型，结论可能不适用于稠密架构或其他模型家族。

limits.en: Cost savings of ~20% are based on specific hardware configurations and may vary in different settings.
limits.zh: 约20%的成本节省基于特定硬件配置，不同设置下可能有所变化。

limits.en: The models are evaluated on limited benchmarks; performance on broader tasks remains to be validated.
limits.zh: 模型在有限基准上评估，更广泛任务上的性能有待验证。

To address these issues, we present two differently sized MoE large language models (LLMs), namely Ling-Lite and Ling-Plus (referred to as "Bailing" in Chinese, spelled Bǎilíng in Pinyin). Ling-Lite contains 16.8 billion parameters with 2.75 billion activated parameters, while Ling-Plus boasts 290 billion parameters with 28.8 billion activated parameters. Both models exhibit comparable performance to leading industry benchmarks. This report offers actionable insights to improve the efficiency and accessibility of AI development in resource-constrained settings, promoting more scalable and sustainable technologies. Specifically, to reduce training costs for large-scale MoE models, we propose innovative methods for (1) optimization of model architecture and training processes, (2) refinement of training anomaly handling, and (3) enhancement of model evaluation efficiency. Additionally, leveraging high-quality data generated from knowledge graphs, our models demonstrate superior capabilities in tool use compared to other models. Ultimately, our experimental findings demonstrate that a 300B MoE LLM can be effectively trained on lower-performance devices while achieving comparable performance to models of a similar scale, including dense and MoE models. Compared to high-performance devices, utilizing a lower-specification hardware system during the pre-training phase demonstrates significant cost savings, reducing computing costs by approximately 20%. The models can be accessed at https://huggingface.co/inclusionAI.
items.zh: 在本技术报告中，我们应对训练大规模混合专家（MoE）模型的挑战，重点克服此类系统中普遍存在的成本效率低下和资源限制问题。为解决这些问题，我们提出了两种不同规模的MoE大语言模型（LLM），即Ling-Lite和Ling-Plus（中文名为“百灵”，拼音Bǎilíng）。Ling-Lite包含168亿参数，其中27.5亿被激活；Ling-Plus则拥有2900亿参数，其中288亿被激活。两个模型均表现出与行业领先基准相当的性能。本报告提供了可操作的见解，以提高资源受限环境下AI开发的效率和可及性，推动更具可扩展性和可持续性的技术。具体而言，为降低大规模MoE模型的训练成本，我们提出了创新方法，用于（1）优化模型架构和训练过程，（2）改进训练异常处理，以及（3）提升模型评估效率。此外，利用知识图谱生成的高质量数据，我们的模型在工具使用方面展现出优于其他模型的能力。最终，我们的实验结果表明，一个300B的MoE LLM可以在较低性能的设备上有效训练，同时达到与类似规模模型（包括稠密模型和MoE模型）相当的性能。与高性能设备相比，在预训练阶段使用较低规格的硬件系统可显著节省成本，计算成本降低约20%。模型可在https://huggingface.co/inclusionAI获取。

items.en: In recent years, the rapid development of LLMs OpenAI (2024a); Gemini (2024); Claude (2024); Qwen (2025); DeepSeek-AI (2025) has sparked widespread discussions across academia and industry regarding Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). While dense models have achieved remarkable progress, MoE models, such as the DeepSeek series DeepSeek-AI (2024a, b, 2025), the Qwen series Bai et al. (2023); Yang et al. (2024); Qwen (2025), and the MiniMax-01 series MiniMax (2025), have demonstrated outstanding performance, even surpassing traditional dense models in certain specific tasks. However, the training of MoE models typically relies on high-performance computing resources (e.g., advanced AI accelerator like H100 and H800), and their prohibitively high costs have limited broader adoption in resource-constrained environments. This study proposes innovative training strategies to enable efficient LLM training under restricted resources and budget constraints, thereby advancing the inclusive development of AI technologies. To provide the industry with a novel approach to model training in resource-constrained scenarios and to inspire the development of more innovative solutions, this report introduces our open-source MoE models, Ling-Lite (with a total parameter count of 16.8B and an activation parameter count of 2.75B) and Ling-Plus (with a total parameter count of 290B and an activation parameter count of 28.8B), focusing on their exploration and optimization practices.
items.zh: 近年来，LLM的快速发展OpenAI (2024a); Gemini (2024); Claude (2024); Qwen (2025); DeepSeek-AI (2025)引发了学术界和工业界关于通用人工智能（AGI）的广泛讨论。虽然稠密模型取得了显著进展，但MoE模型，如DeepSeek系列DeepSeek-AI (2024a, b, 2025)、Qwen系列Bai et al. (2023); Yang et al. (2024); Qwen (2025)和MiniMax-01系列MiniMax (2025)，展现出了卓越的性能，甚至在某些特定任务上超越了传统的稠密模型。然而，MoE模型的训练通常依赖于高性能计算资源（例如先进的AI加速器如H100和H800），其高昂的成本限制了在资源受限环境中的广泛应用。本研究提出了创新的训练策略，以在资源有限和预算约束下实现高效的LLM训练，从而推动AI技术的包容性发展。为了向业界提供资源受限场景下模型训练的新方法，并激发更多创新解决方案的开发，本报告介绍了我们的开源MoE模型Ling-Lite（总参数量168亿，激活参数量27.5亿）和Ling-Plus（总参数量2900亿，激活参数量288亿），重点阐述了它们的探索和优化实践。

items.en: The availability of computational resources is a critical determinant in the development of LLMs, particularly in the context of the increasingly popular MoE architecture. Recent State-of-the-art MoE models rely heavily on high-performance AI accelerators (e.g., H100 and H800) for training, yet the supply of such resources has remained constrained in recent years. Similar to the analysis on the imbalance of day-night inference load in the DeepSeek’s open-source files DeepSeek (2025), in the commercial deployment of AI services, these high-performance resources are also in high demand during peak usage periods to ensure service quality. As a result, many LLM research organizations face persistent shortages of high-performance AI accelerators.
items.zh: 计算资源的可用性是LLM开发的关键决定因素，尤其是在日益流行的MoE架构背景下。最近的最先进MoE模型严重依赖高性能AI加速器（例如H100和H800）进行训练，但近年来此类资源的供应一直受限。类似于DeepSeek开源文件中关于昼夜推理负载不平衡的分析DeepSeek (2025)，在AI服务的商业部署中，这些高性能资源在高峰使用时段也有很高的需求，以确保服务质量。因此，许多LLM研究机构面临高性能AI加速器的持续短缺。

items.en: In comparison, lower-performance accelerators are more widely available and maybe cost-effective on a per-unit basis. This discrepancy highlights the need for a technical framework that enables seamless switching between heterogeneous computing units and distributed clusters for training and inference. Such a system could alleviate the supply-demand imbalance and reduce overall training costs. The training of our Ling models utilized the computational resources in Table 1.
items.zh: 相比之下，较低性能的加速器更广泛可用，且单位成本可能更具性价比。这种差异凸显了对技术框架的需求，该框架能够在异构计算单元和分布式集群之间实现无缝切换，用于训练和推理。这样的系统可以缓解供需不平衡并降低总体训练成本。我们的Ling模型的训练使用了表1中的计算资源。

items.en: From an economic efficiency perspective, these solutions reduce unit compute costs. However, the heterogeneous nature of device architectures (e.g., DSA and GPGPU) and the geographical dispersion of clusters introduce significant technical challenges, primarily in the following three aspects.
items.zh: 从经济效率的角度来看，这些解决方案降低了单位计算成本。然而，设备架构的异构性（例如DSA和GPGPU）以及集群的地理分散性带来了显著的技术挑战，主要体现在以下三个方面。

items.en: Cross-cluster and cross-device compatibility. As described in the open-source project FlagScale FlagOpen (2025), heterogeneous hardware environments often exhibit discrepancies in the implementation of low-level computational and communication operators and high-level distributed training frameworks. These challenges are particularly evident in training advanced architectures like MoE, where operators such as group_gemm, permute/unpermute, and all2all, and distributed strategies like expert parallelism may be missing or perform inconsistently across platforms. Ensuring training accuracy and portability requires: (1) collaboration with hardware vendors to standardize low-level operators, ensuring computational and communication consistency, (2) development of cross-platform compatibility layers to support seamless integration across distributed training frameworks, and (3) implementation of efficient debugging mechanisms for identifying and resolving issues in complex and heterogeneous environments.
items.zh: 跨集群和跨设备兼容性。如开源项目FlagScale FlagOpen (2025)所述，异构硬件环境在底层计算和通信算子以及高层分布式训练框架的实现上常常存在差异。这些挑战在训练MoE等先进架构时尤为明显，其中诸如group_gemm、permute/unpermute和all2all等算子，以及专家并行等分布式策略，可能在不同平台上缺失或表现不一致。确保训练准确性和可移植性需要：（1）与硬件供应商合作，标准化底层算子，确保计算和通信的一致性；（2）开发跨平台兼容层，支持分布式训练框架间的无缝集成；（3）实现高效的调试机制，用于在复杂异构环境中识别和解决问题。

items.en: Reliability of cross-cluster resource synchronization. LLM training, especially for ultra-large MoE models, requires managing massive datasets and checkpoint backups that can reach petabyte (PB) scales. Seamless task migration across clusters relies on: (1) achieving low-latency, consistent synchronization of data resources across clusters and (2) enabling flexible, high-speed management and I/O for training artifacts, such as model checkpoints, across distributed clusters.
items.zh: 跨集群资源同步的可靠性。LLM训练，尤其是超大规模MoE模型，需要管理海量数据集和检查点备份，其规模可达PB级。跨集群的无缝任务迁移依赖于：（1）实现跨集群数据资源的低延迟、一致性同步；（2）支持跨分布式集群对训练工件（如模型检查点）进行灵活、高速的管理和I/O。

items.en: Cost-performance optimization. Balancing cost efficiency and model performance is a core objective. Achieving this requires: (1) optimization of hardware resource allocation and scheduling, (2) trade-offs between computational efficiency and training precision, and (3) rational design and scaling of model architectures to ensure cost-effective performance.
items.zh: 成本-性能优化。平衡成本效率和模型性能是核心目标。实现这一目标需要：（1）优化硬件资源分配和调度；（2）在计算效率和训练精度之间进行权衡；（3）合理设计和缩放模型架构，以确保成本效益的性能。

items.en: To address the above-mentioned technical challenges posed by limited computational resources, we implement a series of systematic optimization strategies to balance resource cost and model performance. These strategies are outlined as follows.
items.zh: 为应对上述有限计算资源带来的技术挑战，我们实施了一系列系统性的优化策略，以平衡资源成本和模型性能。这些策略概述如下。

items.en: Optimization of model architecture and training strategies. To enable efficient deployment on resource-constrained platforms, we adpot the following three strategies. (1) Model architecture optimization: Based on the comprehensive analysis of scaling laws for dense and MoE models, we can choose the best-matching architecture for the available computational resource. (2) Training framework optimization: For heterogeneous computing platforms, we integrate multiple training frameworks into a unified distributed deep learning framework, i.e., our open-source project, DLRover DLRover (2023). Additionally, to leverage the specific characteristics of various platforms, we develop a lightweight debugging tool, XPUTimer, which facilitates rapid and cost-effective task performance analysis while achieving a 90% reduction in memory usage. Furthermore, we implement a platform-agnostic asynchronous training strategy, namely EDiT (Elastic Distributed Training), which enhances the training efficiency, under various configurations, the training time can be reduced by up to 66.1%. (3) Storage optimization: Techniques such as device multi-tenancy and file system in user space (FUSE) are applied to achieve high performance and multi-cluster adaptability for large-scale training. Collaborative design of storage and training processes enhances I/O efficiency in MoE scenarios, reducing time overhead by 50%.
items.zh: 模型架构和训练策略的优化。为了在资源受限平台上实现高效部署，我们采用了以下三种策略。（1）模型架构优化：基于对稠密和MoE模型缩放定律的全面分析，我们可以为可用计算资源选择最佳匹配的架构。（2）训练框架优化：针对异构计算平台，我们将多个训练框架集成到一个统一的分布式深度学习框架中，即我们的开源项目DLRover DLRover (2023)。此外，为利用各平台的特定特性，我们开发了一个轻量级调试工具XPUTimer，便于快速且低成本地进行任务性能分析，同时内存使用减少90%。此外，我们实现了一个平台无关的异步训练策略，即EDiT（弹性分布式训练），该策略提升了训练效率，在各种配置下，训练时间最多可减少66.1%。（3）存储优化：应用设备多租户和用户空间文件系统（FUSE）等技术，实现大规模训练的高性能和多集群适应性。存储与训练过程的协同设计提升了MoE场景下的I/O效率，时间开销减少50%。

items.en: Refinement of training anomaly handling. To address hardware errors and loss anomalies in large-scale training, we develop a robust anomaly-handling mechanism as follows. (1) Multi-level anomaly detection system: To detect anomalies throughout the training process, we establish a real-time monitoring system. (2) Automated checkpoint recovery: To minimize the impact of anomalies on training progression, we implement an automated recovery mechanism.
items.zh: 训练异常处理的改进。为应对大规模训练中的硬件错误和损失异常，我们开发了如下鲁棒的异常处理机制。（1）多级异常检测系统：为检测整个训练过程中的异常，我们建立了实时监控系统。（2）自动检查点恢复：为最小化异常对训练进程的影响，我们实现了自动恢复机制。

items.en: Enhancement of model evaluation efficiency. To optimize monitoring of cross-cluster model training, we attempt to improve the evaluation benchmarks and frameworks as follows. (1) Comprehensive evaluation dataset: To mitigate initial model underperformance and improve stability, we construct some domain-specific evaluation datasets and optimize the corresponding prediction strategies and prompting templates. (2) Efficient evaluation system: Based on our self-innovate offline inference framework, i.e., Flood, we develop a scalable system for cross-cluster evaluations with consistent results, achieving an average deviation of less than 0.5%. (3) Automated analysis system: To provide real-time feedback to adjust training strategies, we develop an automated system to correlate evaluation results with model performance and datasets.
items.zh: 模型评估效率的提升。为优化跨集群模型训练的监控，我们尝试改进评估基准和框架如下。（1）综合评估数据集：为缓解模型初期性能不佳并提高稳定性，我们构建了一些特定领域的评估数据集，并优化了相应的预测策略和提示模板。（2）高效评估系统：基于我们自研的离线推理框架Flood，我们开发了一个可扩展的跨集群评估系统，结果一致，平均偏差小于0.5%。（3）自动分析系统：为提供实时反馈以调整训练策略，我们开发了一个自动系统，将评估结果与模型性能和数据集相关联。

items.en: Improvement of tool use capability. To enhance the tool use ability of large models, we focus on the following two key aspects. (1) High-quality data synthesis: To efficiently generate high-quality, scalable, and diverse tool-use data, we leverage knowledge graph technology and generalized calling instructions to extract diverse and complex function chains and thus enhance the applicability of Ling models across various real-world scenarios. (2) Adaptive tool learning: By leveraging learning strategies such as rejection sampling and error correction, we develop self-reflective multi-agent interactive dialogues to enhance the adaptive tool use capability of the Ling model.
items.zh: 工具使用能力的提升。为增强大模型的工具使用能力，我们重点关注以下两个关键方面。（1）高质量数据合成：为高效生成高质量、可扩展且多样化的工具使用数据，我们利用知识图谱技术和通用调用指令来提取多样且复杂的函数链，从而增强Ling模型在各种实际场景中的适用性。（2）自适应工具学习：通过利用拒绝采样和纠错等学习策略，我们开发了自反思的多智能体交互对话，以增强Ling模型的自适应工具使用能力。

items.en: Based on the above-mentioned technical optimizations, we develop and open-source the Ling series of MoE models, which achieves a balanced trade-off between resource cost and model performance. From the perspective of resource efficiency, Ling-Plus serves as an illustrative example, with pre-training conducted on 9 trillion tokens across five distinct hardware configurations (as detailed in Table 1). Training 1 trillion tokens using the high-performance hardware configuration (device D) incurs an estimated cost of approximately 6.35 million RMB. In contrast, utilizing a lower-specification hardware system reduces the cost to around 5.08 million RMB, representing a cost savings of nearly 20%. These results demonstrate the feasibility of training state-of-the-art (SOTA) large-scale MoE models on less powerful hardware, enabling a more flexible and cost-effective approach to foundational model development with respect to computing resource selection.
items.zh: 基于上述技术优化，我们开发并开源了Ling系列MoE模型，实现了资源成本与模型性能之间的平衡权衡。从资源效率的角度来看，Ling-Plus是一个示例，其在五种不同的硬件配置上使用9万亿个token进行预训练（详见表1）。使用高性能硬件配置（设备D）训练1万亿个token的成本估计约为635万人民币。相比之下，使用较低规格的硬件系统可将成本降至约508万人民币，节省近20%的成本。这些结果证明了在性能较弱的硬件上训练最先进（SOTA）大规模MoE模型的可行性，从而在计算资源选择方面实现更灵活、更具成本效益的基础模型开发。

items.en: We evaluated our Ling models on a comprehensive array of benchmarks. With similar parameter sizes, our Ling models trained under limited resources and budget constraints deliver comparable performance to existing open-source models, particularly in the ability of tool use (see the evaluation results in Figures 1 and 2).
items.zh: 我们在全面的基准测试上评估了我们的Ling模型。在相似参数规模下，我们的Ling模型在有限资源和预算约束下训练，提供了与现有开源模型相当的性能，特别是在工具使用能力方面（见图1和图2的评估结果）。

items.en: Despite the above-mentioned contributions, the process of transitioning training tasks across different accelerators continues to pose significant challenges. Throughout the training process, several issues were identified, which are outlined below along with the key insights derived from addressing them:
items.zh: 尽管有上述贡献，但在不同加速器之间迁移训练任务的过程仍然面临重大挑战。在整个训练过程中，发现了若干问题，下面列出这些问题以及从解决它们中获得的关键见解：

items.en: Training stability. During the training of ultra-large-scale models, both hardware-related factors and seemingly minor modifications to the network structure can substantially influence the stability and convergence of the models. In particular, challenges such as loss divergence, loss spikes, and expert load imbalance were observed. These issues, along with the strategies employed to address them, are thoroughly discussed in Section 6.
items.zh: 训练稳定性。在超大规模模型的训练过程中，硬件相关因素以及对网络结构的看似微小的修改都可能显著影响模型的稳定性和收敛性。特别是，观察到了损失发散、损失尖峰和专家负载不平衡等挑战。这些问题以及用于解决它们的策略在第6节中详细讨论。

items.en: Cross-platform alignment. When migrating training workflows across different hardware environments, the upper-layer framework provides abstraction and ensures the accuracy of basic operations. However, minor precision errors can accumulate throughout the course of large-scale training. Over time, these seemingly negligible discrepancies can lead to significant variations in outcomes across different hardware configurations.
items.zh: 跨平台对齐。当在不同硬件环境之间迁移训练工作流时，上层框架提供了抽象并确保了基本操作的准确性。然而，微小的精度误差可能会在整个大规模训练过程中累积。随着时间的推移，这些看似微不足道的差异可能导致不同硬件配置下结果的显著差异。

items.en: In the following sections, we will introduce our Ling models in the sequence of Infrastructure (Section 2), Pre-Training (Section 3), and Post-Training (Section 4). Finally, we will present the model’s performance on the evaluation benchmarks in Section 5, along with some of the lessons learned throughout the process in Section 6.
items.zh: 在接下来的章节中，我们将按照基础设施（第2节）、预训练（第3节）和后训练（第4节）的顺序介绍我们的Ling模型。最后，我们将在第5节展示模型在评估基准上的性能，并在第6节分享整个过程中学到的一些经验教训。

items.en: In response to the growing demand for high-performance accelerators required for training large-scale models, expanding computational capacity through the integration of additional hardware has become an essential strategy. To address this challenge , we leverage our open-source project DLRover (Distributed Deep Learning Training System) to optimize and seamlessly migrate computing workloads to proprietary hardware. With the help of this framework, it is very easy to launch training frameworks on different platforms, including DeepSpeed Song et al. (2023), Megatron-LM Shoeybi et al. (2020), and Megatron vendor version. To meet the need for lightweight performance monitoring and fault diagnosis, DLRover incorporates the XPUTimer Cui et al. (2025), a minimalistic runtime performance analysis framework. Furthermore, to mitigate performance decline in large-scale heterogeneous distributed training environments, the EDiT Cheng et al. (2025) method has been adopted, which is an efficient asynchronous training approach tailored for LLMs. In addition to computational efficiency, I/O also has a significant impact on overall performance. To address this, we have developed PCache and a cross-cluster synchronization solution, further enhancing the overall training efficiency. Lastly, to improve data synthesis efficiency and accelerate the evaluation process, a high-performance offline inference framework, named Flood, has been introduced.
items.zh: 为了满足训练大规模模型所需的高性能加速器日益增长的需求，通过集成更多硬件来扩展算力已成为一项关键策略。为应对这一挑战，我们利用开源项目DLRover（分布式深度学习训练系统）来优化计算工作负载，并将其无缝迁移到专有硬件上。借助该框架，可以轻松在不同平台上启动训练框架，包括DeepSpeed（Song等人，2023）、Megatron-LM（Shoeybi等人，2020）以及Megatron供应商版本。为满足轻量级性能监控和故障诊断的需求，DLRover集成了XPUTimer（Cui等人，2025），这是一个极简的运行时性能分析框架。此外，为缓解大规模异构分布式训练环境中的性能下降问题，我们采用了EDiT方法（Cheng等人，2025），这是一种针对大语言模型的高效异步训练方法。除了计算效率，I/O也对整体性能有显著影响。为此，我们开发了PCache和跨集群同步解决方案，进一步提升了整体训练效率。最后，为提高数据合成效率并加速评估过程，我们引入了一个名为Flood的高性能离线推理框架。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The general structure of XPUTimer.

items.en: To address performance bottlenecks and hidden inefficiencies in distributed training of large-scale models, we propose a lightweight analytical tool, referred to as XPUTimer (see Figure 3). XPUTimer has been integrated into our open-source DLRover system, enabling real-time diagnostic capabilities across the entire training stack. This tool also facilitates the retrieval of status information from diverse training environments. As illustrated in Figure 3, XPUTimer comprises two primary components: (1) lightweight selective tracing and (2) diagnostic engine. The selective tracing mechanism is designed to monitor critical training code segments while incurring minimal overhead. The diagnostic engine, in turn, leverages the real-time data collected by a tracking daemon to rapidly pinpoint the root causes of training anomalies.
items.zh: 为解决大规模模型分布式训练中的性能瓶颈和隐藏的低效问题，我们提出了一种轻量级分析工具，称为XPUTimer（见图3）。XPUTimer已集成到我们的开源DLRover系统中，能够对整个训练栈进行实时诊断。该工具还有助于从不同训练环境中检索状态信息。如图3所示，XPUTimer包含两个主要组件：（1）轻量级选择性追踪和（2）诊断引擎。选择性追踪机制旨在以最小开销监控关键训练代码段。诊断引擎则利用追踪守护进程收集的实时数据，快速定位训练异常的根本原因。

items.en: The lightweight selective tracing mechanism is designed to capture and log critical events selectively, ensuring that sufficient diagnostic information is collected without incurring the substantial memory and computational overhead of full-scale monitoring. The key features of this mechanism can be summarized as follows:
items.zh: 轻量级选择性追踪机制旨在选择性捕获和记录关键事件，确保在收集足够诊断信息的同时，避免全量监控带来的大量内存和计算开销。该机制的主要特点可总结如下：

items.en: Error interception. To identify high-level operations that may introduce performance bottlenecks or errors, we implemented Python-layer interception that allows dynamic configuration of APIs for monitoring (e.g., garbage collection, synchronization, and data loading). This is achieved by modifying environment variables such as TRACED_PYTHON_API. In addition, we designed a framework-agnostic kernel monitoring mechanism using C++/CUDA-level interception. This approach enables the tracking of computation kernels (e.g., cuBLAS and Flash Attention), communication kernels (e.g., NCCL operations), and custom operators via an explicit registration interface.
items.zh: 错误拦截。为识别可能引入性能瓶颈或错误的高层操作，我们实现了Python层拦截，允许动态配置监控API（例如垃圾回收、同步和数据加载）。这是通过修改环境变量（如TRACED_PYTHON_API）实现的。此外，我们利用C++/CUDA层拦截设计了一种框架无关的内核监控机制。该方法能够通过显式注册接口追踪计算内核（如cuBLAS和Flash Attention）、通信内核（如NCCL操作）以及自定义算子。

items.en: Interference avoidance. XPUTimer minimizes its impact on the training process by employing asynchronous event management. Specifically, it combines synchronous APIs for timestamp recording with asynchronous kernels of accelerators using CUDA events to monitor execution states. For instance, events are injected following NCCL kernel launches, and their completion is monitored in a background thread. This approach ensures that the diagnostic process does not interfere with the primary training workflow.
items.zh: 干扰避免。XPUTimer通过采用异步事件管理，最小化对训练过程的影响。具体来说，它结合了用于时间戳记录的同步API和加速器的异步内核（使用CUDA事件）来监控执行状态。例如，在NCCL内核启动后注入事件，并在后台线程中监控其完成情况。这种方法确保诊断过程不会干扰主要的训练工作流。

items.en: Low overhead. XPUTimer is designed to maintain a low-cost diagnostic footprint. To enable asynchronous event management, it employs an optimized architecture that includes: (1) event pool management to reuse pre-allocated CUDA events, (2) asynchronous data processing via a dedicated background thread for event collection and logging, and (3) data compression techniques that record only essential fields, such as timestamps and kernel input layouts. These optimizations lead to significantly reduced log sizes, averaging approximately 1.5 MB per accelerator per training step, which represents an approximate 90% reduction in memory usage, as illustrated in Figure 5.
items.zh: 低开销。XPUTimer旨在保持低成本的诊断足迹。为实现异步事件管理，它采用了一种优化架构，包括：（1）事件池管理以重用预分配的CUDA事件；（2）通过专用后台线程进行异步数据处理，用于事件收集和日志记录；（3）数据压缩技术，仅记录必要字段，如时间戳和内核输入布局。这些优化显著减少了日志大小，平均每个加速器每训练步约1.5 MB，如图5所示，内存使用量减少了约90%。

items.en: The diagnostic engine is also a core component of XPUTimer, responsible for analyzing real-time data collected by the tracing daemon to quickly pinpoint the root causes of training anomalies. It tackles the attribution challenges in large-scale distributed training through two key modules: error diagnosis and performance degradation diagnosis. The design of the diagnostic engine is built around two core objectives:
items.zh: 诊断引擎也是XPUTimer的核心组件，负责分析追踪守护进程收集的实时数据，以快速定位训练异常的根本原因。它通过两个关键模块解决大规模分布式训练中的归因挑战：错误诊断和性能退化诊断。诊断引擎的设计围绕两个核心目标：

items.en: Fast attribution. Through the implementation of a multi-layered diagnostic approach that integrates call stack analysis with in-kernel tracing, the process of error localization is significantly optimized, reducing the time complexity from the conventional O​(l​o​g​N)O(logN) to O​(1)O(1).
items.zh: 快速归因。通过实现多层诊断方法，结合调用栈分析和内核内追踪，错误定位过程得到显著优化，时间复杂度从传统的O(logN)降低到O(1)。

items.en: Fine-grained diagnostics. By combining macro-level metrics (e.g., throughput) with micro-level metrics (e.g., kernel launch latency distribution), it enables anomaly detection across computation, communication, and non-critical operations such as data loading.
items.zh: 细粒度诊断。通过结合宏观指标（如吞吐量）和微观指标（如内核启动延迟分布），它能够检测计算、通信以及非关键操作（如数据加载）中的异常。

items.capEn: Figure 4: The memory usage comparisons between XPUTimer and other methods.
items.capZh: 图4：XPUTimer与其他方法的内存使用比较。

items.capEn: Figure 6: The schematic illustration of the EDiT method with 4 workers as an example.
items.capZh: 图6：以4个工作节点为例的EDiT方法示意图。

items.en: With the explosive growth of model size and training data volume, distributed training methods have become critical for efficient training. However, traditional synchronous distributed training methods (e.g., All-Reduce) face the following challenges: (1) high communication overhead, (2) straggler problem, (3) difficulty in elastic training, and (4) sensitivity to data noise. To address these problems, we adopted EDiT method Cheng et al. (2025), which combines a tailored Local SGD (Stochastic Gradient Descent) approach with model sharding techniques to enhance large-scale training efficiency. The comparisons of EDiT and traditional distributed method are illustrated in Figure 5, and the pipeline of EDiT is illustrated in Figure 7. The characteristics of EDiT can be summarized as follows:
items.zh: 随着模型规模和训练数据量的爆炸式增长，分布式训练方法已成为高效训练的关键。然而，传统的同步分布式训练方法（如All-Reduce）面临以下挑战：（1）高通信开销，（2）掉队者问题，（3）弹性训练困难，以及（4）对数据噪声敏感。为解决这些问题，我们采用了EDiT方法（Cheng等人，2025），该方法结合了定制的局部SGD（随机梯度下降）方法和模型分片技术，以提升大规模训练效率。EDiT与传统分布式方法的比较如图5所示，EDiT的流程如图7所示。EDiT的特点可总结如下：

items.en: Layer-wise synchronization. Different from other Local SGD-based methods, EDiT synchronizes parameters layer by layer during forward propagation, significantly reducing the volume of data communicated in a single operation. With the prefetch method, the communication and computation are further overlapped, minimizing idle time and improving overall efficiency.
items.zh: 逐层同步。与其他基于局部SGD的方法不同，EDiT在前向传播过程中逐层同步参数，显著减少了单次通信的数据量。通过预取方法，通信和计算进一步重叠，最小化空闲时间并提高整体效率。

items.en: Pseudo gradient penalty. EDiT employs a pseudo gradient penalty strategy to suppress the loss spikes caused by diverse large-scale corpus and leverages the differences among workers to improve model performance, which is illustrated in Figure 7. This strategy consists of anomaly elimination, weighted averaging, and gradient clipping.
items.zh: 伪梯度惩罚。EDiT采用伪梯度惩罚策略来抑制由多样化大规模语料库引起的损失尖峰，并利用工作节点之间的差异来提升模型性能，如图7所示。该策略包括异常消除、加权平均和梯度裁剪。

items.en: Anomaly elimination. The pseudo gradients of each worker are tracked using exponential moving average to detect anomalous workers, which are subsequently excluded from the synchronization process.
items.zh: 异常消除。使用指数移动平均追踪每个工作节点的伪梯度，以检测异常工作节点，随后将其排除在同步过程之外。

items.en: Weighted averaging. Contributions from workers are weighted based on their pseudo gradient norms, effectively reducing the influence of noisy or outlier gradients on overall model updates.
items.zh: 加权平均。根据工作节点的伪梯度范数对其贡献进行加权，有效减少噪声或异常梯度对整体模型更新的影响。

items.en: Gradient clipping. A predefined threshold is applied to clip overly large pseudo gradients, ensuring gradient steps remain within a stable range and preventing training instability or divergence.
items.zh: 梯度裁剪。应用预定义阈值裁剪过大的伪梯度，确保梯度步长保持在稳定范围内，防止训练不稳定或发散。

items.en: Time-based synchronization. Instead of synchronizing after a fixed number of iterations (as in conventional Local SGD-based methods), synchronization can also be triggered based on a time threshold in the EDiT method, enabling faster nodes to perform more local updates before syncing. By decoupling synchronization frequency from iteration counts, EDiT solves the problem of fixed stragglers. Furthermore, this adaptive synchronization mechanism enhances scalability and resilience by dynamically balancing workloads, particularly in heterogeneous environments with diverse hardware capabilities.
items.zh: 基于时间的同步。EDiT方法中，同步不仅可以在固定迭代次数后触发（如传统基于局部SGD的方法），还可以基于时间阈值触发，使更快的节点在同步前执行更多局部更新。通过将同步频率与迭代次数解耦，EDiT解决了固定掉队者问题。此外，这种自适应同步机制通过动态平衡工作负载，增强了可扩展性和弹性，特别是在具有不同硬件能力的异构环境中。

items.capEn: Figure 8: The speed comparisons of traditional distributed method and EDiT.
items.capZh: 图8：传统分布式方法与EDiT的速度比较。

items.en: As shown in Figure 8, in an ideal environment, as the number of accelerators increases, the minimum speed of the baseline approaches 5.49​e−25.49e^{-2} step/s, at which point the speed-up ratio of EDiT would reach 66.1%66.1\%. In practice, however, the average step time of slow steps tends to grow longer as the number of accelerators increases or the model size increases, making the actual acceleration effect of EDiT even more pronounced.
items.zh: 如图8所示，在理想环境下，随着加速器数量的增加，基线的最小速度接近5.49e⁻²步/秒，此时EDiT的加速比将达到66.1%。然而在实际中，随着加速器数量或模型规模的增加，慢步骤的平均步长时间往往变长，使得EDiT的实际加速效果更加显著。

full.sec: 2.3 Efficient and Highly-Reliable Cross-Cluster Data Synchronization
full.secZh: 2.3 高效高可靠的跨集群数据同步

items.en: The training of modern MoE models requires processing massive datasets, often involving concurrent training and data processing tasks across distributed clusters. This necessitates efficient and reliable access to diverse datasets across clusters, which becomes challenging in cross-cluster environments. To address this problem, we will introduce (1) a robust distributed storage system and (2) an optimized cross-cluster synchronization mechanism respectively to support the needs of distributed training in the following section.
items.zh: 现代MoE模型的训练需要处理海量数据集，通常涉及跨分布式集群的并发训练和数据处理任务。这需要跨集群高效可靠地访问多样化数据集，而在跨集群环境中这变得具有挑战性。为解决此问题，我们将在下一节分别介绍（1）一个健壮的分布式存储系统和（2）一个优化的跨集群同步机制，以支持分布式训练的需求。

items.en: The exponential growth of data and increasing demands for high-performance input/output (I/O) in MoE models have set higher standards for storage system performance. We propose an in-house solution, PCache, has been developed as an all-flash distributed file caching system. PCache is specifically designed to support large-scale internal model training, addressing the performance and scalability requirements of modern distributed training environments.
items.zh: 数据的指数级增长以及MoE模型对高性能输入/输出（I/O）日益增长的需求，对存储系统性能提出了更高标准。我们提出了一种内部解决方案PCache，它是一个全闪存分布式文件缓存系统。PCache专门设计用于支持大规模内部模型训练，满足现代分布式训练环境的性能和可扩展性要求。

items.capEn: Figure 9: The general structure of acclerator multi-tenancy.
items.capZh: 图9：加速器多租户的通用结构。

items.en: In contemporary storage architectures, most storage services are deployed as independent clusters. However, in multi-cluster environments, device multi-tenancy has become a crucial requirement. This shift introduces two significant challenges:
items.zh: 在当代存储架构中，大多数存储服务作为独立集群部署。然而，在多集群环境中，设备多租户已成为关键需求。这一转变带来了两个重大挑战：

items.en: Dependence on cluster provider storage services. Each cluster provider offers varied storage capabilities, leading to potential inconsistencies in training performance across heterogeneous cluster environments.
items.zh: 对集群提供商存储服务的依赖。每个集群提供商提供不同的存储能力，导致异构集群环境中训练性能可能出现不一致。

items.en: Challenges in building custom storage services. Independently deployed storage systems face challenges related to hardware compatibility across multiple sites, further compounded by the associated operational and maintenance costs. Networking constraints exacerbate these difficulties. Some cluster providers offer high-performance networks for data transfer, while others do not.
items.zh: 构建自定义存储服务的挑战。独立部署的存储系统面临跨站点的硬件兼容性问题，并伴随相关的运维成本。网络限制加剧了这些困难。一些集群提供商提供高性能网络用于数据传输，而其他则不提供。

items.en: To address these challenges, we have designed a storage service specifically optimized for large-scale model training (see Figure 9), incorporating the following core features:
items.zh: 为应对这些挑战，我们设计了一种专门针对大规模模型训练优化的存储服务（见图9），包含以下核心特性：

items.en: Broad hardware compatibility and scalability. The system ensures seamless integration across multi-cluster environments.
items.zh: 广泛的硬件兼容性和可扩展性。该系统确保跨多集群环境的无缝集成。

items.en: Cost-performance balance. It achieves a competitive trade-off between operational costs and performance optimization, ensuring that scalability does not compromise efficiency.
items.zh: 成本-性能平衡。它在运营成本和性能优化之间实现了有竞争力的权衡，确保可扩展性不会损害效率。

items.en: Currently, most accelerators are equipped with four or more NVMe SSDs, a configuration that serves as the foundation for PCache’s design. To optimize performance and resource utilization, PCache employs a mixed deployment model, integrating the storage service directly onto computing nodes. This integrated approach minimizes the costs associated with standalone deployments while significantly reducing network latency through localized data processing. This ensures that storage throughput grows proportionally with the expansion of computing cluster computational capabilities, providing a scalable and efficient solution for large-scale distributed training systems.
items.zh: 目前，大多数加速器配备四个或更多NVMe SSD，这一配置是PCache设计的基础。为优化性能和资源利用，PCache采用混合部署模型，将存储服务直接集成到计算节点上。这种集成方法降低了独立部署的成本，同时通过本地化数据处理显著减少了网络延迟。这确保了存储吞吐量随计算集群计算能力的扩展而按比例增长，为大规模分布式训练系统提供了可扩展且高效的解决方案。

items.en: During the distributed training of MoE models, it is essential to optimize I/O performance to prevent excessive time consumption caused by reading data, checkpoints, and other resources, which can negatively impact training efficiency. The optimization strategies adopted by the PCache system are as follows:
items.zh: 在MoE模型的分布式训练过程中，必须优化I/O性能，以防止读取数据、检查点等资源消耗过多时间，从而对训练效率产生负面影响。PCache系统采用的优化策略如下：

items.en: File system in user space (FUSE). In checkpoint read/write scenarios, PCache employs an interception mechanism to eliminate the overhead of multiple switches or data copies between user space and kernel space. By leveraging shared memory (shm), the system accelerates access efficiency for medium to large files.
items.zh: 用户空间文件系统（FUSE）。在检查点读/写场景中，PCache采用拦截机制，消除用户空间和内核空间之间的多次切换或数据拷贝开销。通过利用共享内存（shm），系统加速了中大型文件的访问效率。

items.en: Metadata cache. A metadata caching strategy combining file-level and data block-level caching significantly enhances client-side read performance, particularly in scenarios involving high volumes of random reads.
items.zh: 元数据缓存。结合文件级和数据块级缓存的元数据缓存策略显著提升了客户端读取性能，特别是在高随机读取场景中。

items.en: Worker selection strategy. This strategy prevents performance degradation caused by cluster bottlenecks or hotspots on overloaded machines.
items.zh: 工作节点选择策略。该策略防止因集群瓶颈或过载机器上的热点导致的性能下降。

items.en: Based on these four optimization strategies, the PCache system achieves the following performance outcomes:
items.zh: 基于这四种优化策略，PCache系统实现了以下性能成果：

items.en: Single client performance. For scenarios involving single-threaded large file writes, PCache achieves throughput rates of 3–4 GB/s. In multi-threaded scenarios, throughput increases to 20–30 GB/s.
items.zh: 单客户端性能。对于单线程大文件写入场景，PCache实现3–4 GB/s的吞吐率。在多线程场景中，吞吐量提升至20–30 GB/s。

items.en: Cluster-wide throughput. Across a 1,000-accelerator cluster, PCache delivers aggregate throughput of 1 TB/s. For clusters with 10,000 accelerators, throughput scales linearly to 8 TB/s.
items.zh: 集群级吞吐量。在1000加速器集群中，PCache提供1 TB/s的聚合吞吐量。对于10000加速器集群，吞吐量线性扩展至8 TB/s。

items.en: Megatron, a commonly used framework for training tasks in MoE scenarios, operates with a specific design for checkpoint writing. During the checkpoint writing phase, model and optimizer data are written based on Data Parallel (DP) groups, with the default behavior assigning the responsibility for data aggregation and storage to the rank_0 device of each DP group. However, this approach can lead to resource contention, as the rank_0 devices from all DP groups are often concentrated on specific physical nodes. This concentration results in competition for CPU computational resources and network bandwidth, ultimately reducing the overall efficiency of the checkpointing process. To address this issue, PCache implements a strategy to distribute DP group checkpoint writing across different physical nodes, rather than concentrating them on a subset of nodes. By dispersing the write nodes for each DP group, this approach mitigates competition for computational resources and network bandwidth. In real-world experiments with a 5,000-accelerator MoE training task, this optimization reduced checkpoint writing latency by 50%, while also lowering peak memory consumption on training nodes by 60%, as is shown in Table 2.
items.zh: Megatron是MoE场景中常用的训练任务框架，其检查点写入有特定设计。在检查点写入阶段，模型和优化器数据基于数据并行（DP）组写入，默认行为是将数据聚合和存储的责任分配给每个DP组的rank_0设备。然而，这种方法可能导致资源争用，因为所有DP组的rank_0设备通常集中在特定物理节点上。这种集中导致CPU计算资源和网络带宽的竞争，最终降低检查点过程的整体效率。为解决此问题，PCache实施了一种策略，将DP组检查点写入分散到不同物理节点，而不是集中在部分节点上。通过分散每个DP组的写入节点，这种方法减轻了计算资源和网络带宽的竞争。在5000加速器MoE训练任务的实际实验中，该优化将检查点写入延迟降低了50%，同时将训练节点的峰值内存消耗降低了60%，如表2所示。

items.en: In distributed AI training scenarios, achieving efficient and reliable data synchronization across cluster environments presents unique challenges. To address this, we developed Babel, a data synchronization middleware specifically designed for large-scale model training. Babel is tailored to solve the complex problem of efficiently transmitting massive unstructured datasets and high-frequency checkpoint (ckpt) files in cross-cluster and cross-region environments.
items.zh: 在分布式AI训练场景中，跨集群环境实现高效可靠的数据同步面临独特挑战。为此，我们开发了Babel，一种专为大规模模型训练设计的数据同步中间件。Babel旨在解决跨集群和跨区域环境下高效传输海量非结构化数据集及高频检查点（ckpt）文件的复杂问题。

items.en: Whether it involves petabyte-scale datasets, billions of files, or frequently updated training state files, Babel provides a stable, high-speed, and accurate data synchronization service. Leveraging innovative features such as an adaptive data sharding strategy, efficient metadata prefetching mechanisms, and multi-dimensional data verification techniques, Babel significantly improves the transmission efficiency of large files while ensuring end-to-end data consistency. These capabilities provide robust technical support for distributed training environments. The main capabilities of Babel are summarized as follows.
items.zh: 无论是PB级数据集、数十亿文件还是频繁更新的训练状态文件，Babel都能提供稳定、高速且精确的数据同步服务。通过自适应数据分片策略、高效元数据预取机制和多维数据验证技术等创新特性，Babel在确保端到端数据一致性的同时，显著提升了大文件的传输效率。这些能力为分布式训练环境提供了强有力的技术支持。Babel的主要能力总结如下。

items.capEn: Figure 10: The parallel metadata prefetching mechanism.
items.capZh: 图10：并行元数据预取机制。

items.en: In distributed training workflows, metadata management plays a pivotal role in determining task startup time. Synchronizing millions or even billions of file entries using traditional serial loading methods often leads to prolonged startup times, thereby significantly reducing overall efficiency. To address this challenge, we propose a parallel metadata prefetching mechanism (see Figure 10), which leverages concurrent Object Storage Service (OSS) List operations in conjunction with intelligent scheduling algorithms.
items.zh: 在分布式训练工作流中，元数据管理对任务启动时间起着决定性作用。使用传统串行加载方法同步数百万甚至数十亿文件条目，往往导致启动时间过长，从而显著降低整体效率。为应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种并行元数据预取机制（见图10），该机制利用并发对象存储服务（OSS）列表操作与智能调度算法相结合。

items.en: To evaluate the effectiveness of this method, we conducted a performance test using OSS data comprising 190 million files. The results demonstrate a substantial improvement, with approximately a 36-fold increase in performance. Specifically, serial file listing required over six hours, whereas the parallel metadata prefetching mechanism reduced the processing time to approximately ten minutes. These findings highlight the significant efficiency gains achieved through the adoption of concurrent operations in large-scale distributed training environments.
items.zh: 为评估该方法的有效性，我们使用包含1.9亿个文件的OSS数据进行了性能测试。结果表明性能大幅提升，约提高了36倍。具体而言，串行文件列表需要超过6小时，而并行元数据预取机制将处理时间缩短至约10分钟。这些发现凸显了在大规模分布式训练环境中采用并发操作所带来的显著效率提升。

items.en: Babel implements a highly efficient and robust data verification framework that encompasses both metadata validation and content-based sampling cyclic redundancy check (CRC) verification. The system offers two distinct verification modes: real-time (runtime) verification and post-transfer verification. Traditional methods, such as MD5 hashing, often require extensive computational resources and significant time to verify large files (e.g., 100GB files), taking tens to hundreds of seconds to complete. To address these inefficiencies, Babel leverages a content-sampling-based CRC verification approach specifically designed for large files. This method significantly accelerates the verification process while reducing CPU consumption, all without compromising transmission accuracy. By adopting this optimization strategy, Babel reduces the verification time for a 100GB file to approximately three seconds, achieving an effective balance between verification speed and reliability.
items.zh: Babel实现了一个高效且鲁棒的数据验证框架，涵盖元数据验证和基于内容采样的循环冗余校验（CRC）验证。系统提供两种不同的验证模式：实时（运行时）验证和传输后验证。传统方法如MD5哈希，通常需要大量计算资源和时间来验证大文件（例如100GB文件），耗时数十到数百秒。为解决这些低效问题，Babel采用了一种基于内容采样的CRC验证方法，专门针对大文件设计。该方法显著加速了验证过程，同时降低了CPU消耗，且不影响传输准确性。通过采用这一优化策略，Babel将100GB文件的验证时间减少到约3秒，在验证速度和可靠性之间实现了有效平衡。

items.en: The current mainstream inference frameworks are primarily designed for online inference, emphasizing increased throughput under specific latency constraints. Consequently, parallelization strategies predominantly include inter-node tensor parallelism (TP) and intra-node pipeline parallelism (PP) across multiple computational nodes. However, TP often incurs substantial communication overhead, particularly in computing systems that lack high-speed interconnects such as NVLINK. In such cases, communication overhead can account for more than half of the total execution time. To address these limitations and enhance throughput by reducing communication overhead, we propose an efficient offline inference framework named Flood Flood (2025), which adopts a fully pipeline-parallel (PP) architecture.
items.zh: 当前主流推理框架主要针对在线推理设计，强调在特定延迟约束下提高吞吐量。因此，并行化策略主要包括跨计算节点的张量并行（TP）和节点内的流水线并行（PP）。然而，TP通常会产生大量通信开销，尤其是在缺乏高速互连（如NVLINK）的计算系统中。在这种情况下，通信开销可能占总执行时间的一半以上。为解决这些限制并通过减少通信开销来提高吞吐量，我们提出了一种名为Flood Flood (2025)的高效离线推理框架，该框架采用全流水线并行（PP）架构。

items.en: Under high-concurrency scenarios, PP demonstrates superior throughput compared to TP and simplifies model adaptation by eliminating the need for tensor splitting. Instead of the conventional one-to-one mapping of processes to accelerators, our framework employs a many-to-one mapping strategy. This approach reduces inter-process communication overhead while offering greater flexibility in system design. To further isolate the performance impact of multiple processes on a single accelerator, a multi-stream strategy is implemented, where each process running on an accelerator is associated with a distinct stream. For multi-node inference, we initialize a number of processes on each node equal to the total number of pipeline stages. Leveraging the PP strategy enables the achievement of zero CPU overhead. For instance, in a single-node configuration with 8 accelerators, we deploy 9 processes such that there is always one process waiting for the accelerator assigned to the first pipeline stage to become available. This ensures that accelerator resources are utilized continuously, thereby minimizing idle time.
items.zh: 在高并发场景下，PP相比TP展现出更高的吞吐量，并通过消除张量拆分简化了模型适配。我们的框架没有采用传统的一对一进程到加速器映射，而是采用多对一映射策略。这种方法减少了进程间通信开销，同时在系统设计中提供了更大的灵活性。为进一步隔离单个加速器上多个进程的性能影响，我们实现了多流策略，其中每个在加速器上运行的进程都与一个不同的流相关联。对于多节点推理，我们在每个节点上初始化与流水线阶段总数相等的进程数。利用PP策略可以实现零CPU开销。例如，在单节点配置中，使用8个加速器，我们部署9个进程，使得始终有一个进程在等待分配给第一流水线阶段的加速器变为可用。这确保了加速器资源被持续利用，从而最大限度地减少空闲时间。

items.en: In parallel, popular frameworks such as vLLM Kwon et al. (2023) commonly utilize block tables for managing the key-value cache (kvcache). However, small block sizes can result in inefficient utilization of computational resources. To address this issue and maximize accelerator resource usage, we propose a novel segment cache mechanism that allocates the kvcache in a contiguous memory space to enable the use of larger block sizes. Specifically, we allocate a kvcache tensor with the shape [m​a​x​_​t​o​k​e​n​_​n​u​m,n​u​m​_​h​e​a​d,h​e​a​d​_​d​i​m][max\_token\_num,num\_head,head\_dim]. During inference, a pre-allocated contiguous memory space is dedicated to each request to accommodate both the prompt and the output. This design, illustrated in Figure 11, facilitates efficient memory management and enhances computational performance.
items.zh: 与此同时，流行的框架如vLLM Kwon et al. (2023)通常使用块表来管理键值缓存（kvcache）。然而，小块大小可能导致计算资源利用效率低下。为解决此问题并最大化加速器资源利用率，我们提出了一种新颖的段缓存机制，该机制在连续内存空间中分配kvcache，以便使用更大的块大小。具体来说，我们分配一个形状为[m​a​x​_​t​o​k​e​n​_​n​u​m,n​u​m​_​h​e​a​d,h​e​a​d​_​d​i​m]的kvcache张量。在推理过程中，为每个请求分配一个预分配的连续内存空间，以容纳提示和输出。这种设计如图11所示，有助于高效的内存管理并提升计算性能。

items.en: In typical scenarios where the user-defined maximum output length is relatively small, the cache can be allocated based on this predefined maximum length. However, in cases where the specified maximum output length is exceptionally large (e.g., 32,768 tokens) and significantly surpasses the actual generated output length, this can result in the allocation of overly large segment caches, thereby reducing request concurrency. To address this inefficiency, a segment with a conservative size will be used during the initial allocation phase. If the actual generated tokens exceeds the allocated segment size, the following strategies can be employed:
items.zh: 在典型场景中，用户定义的最大输出长度相对较小，缓存可以根据此预定义的最大长度进行分配。然而，在指定最大输出长度非常大（例如32,768个token）且显著超过实际生成输出长度的情况下，这可能导致分配过大的段缓存，从而降低请求并发度。为解决此低效问题，在初始分配阶段将使用一个保守大小的段。如果实际生成的token超过分配的段大小，可以采用以下策略：

items.en: Extend the current segment. If the next segment in the kvcache memory space is free, the current segment can be extended into the adjacent space.
items.zh: 扩展当前段。如果kvcache内存空间中的下一个段是空闲的，则可以将当前段扩展到相邻空间。

items.en: Append an additional segment. If the next segment is occupied and an other segment is available, it can be appended to the request’s segment list to accommodate the overflow.
items.zh: 追加额外段。如果下一个段被占用且另一个段可用，则可以将其追加到请求的段列表中以容纳溢出。

items.en: Wait. If neither extension nor appending is possible, the request is placed in a wait-list until a segment becomes available.
items.zh: 等待。如果既不能扩展也不能追加，则将该请求放入等待列表，直到有段可用。

items.en: The segment cache not only resolves the challenges associated with excessively long maximum output lengths but also inherently supports prefix caching. For batch requests sharing a common prefix, the prefix can be stored using a single segment or a combination of multiple segments.
items.zh: 段缓存不仅解决了过长最大输出长度带来的挑战，还天然支持前缀缓存。对于共享公共前缀的批量请求，前缀可以使用单个段或多个段的组合来存储。

items.en: Finally, we compare our Flood with vLLM (the version is ‘0.6.6.post2’) on a benchmark dataset, i.e., shareGPT AI (2023), and the detailed performance comparison is listed in Table 3. The performance is measured by generated tokens per second.
items.zh: 最后，我们在基准数据集shareGPT AI (2023)上将我们的Flood与vLLM（版本为'0.6.6.post2'）进行了比较，详细的性能对比列于表3。性能以每秒生成的token数衡量。

items.en: The Ling models demonstrate their competitive performance through rigorous methodologies designed to enhance the quality of large-scale pre-training datasets. The corpus utilized in the model development is a diverse collection of textual and non-textual data, encompassing sources such as web content, books, academic papers, social media, encyclopedias, mathematics, and programming code. To date, we have constructed a high-quality corpus consisting of approximately 9 trillion tokens, distributed across 1 trillion tokens in Chinese, 5.5 trillion in English, and 2.5 trillion in code. The development of such a large-scale, high-quality dataset is the result of systematic improvements in several key areas:
items.zh: Ling模型通过旨在提升大规模预训练数据集质量的严格方法展示了其竞争性能。模型开发中使用的语料库是文本和非文本数据的多样化集合，涵盖网络内容、书籍、学术论文、社交媒体、百科全书、数学和编程代码等来源。迄今为止，我们已构建了一个包含约9万亿token的高质量语料库，其中中文1万亿token、英文5.5万亿token、代码2.5万亿token。如此大规模高质量数据集的开发是以下几个关键领域系统性改进的结果：

items.en: Data curation. The majority of raw data used in this study were obtained from publicly available sources, including Common Crawl (CC), coding platforms, and encyclopedias. However, these sources often exhibit a range of quality issues. To address this, we developed specialized data cleaning pipelines tailored to the characteristics of different data types (e.g., web pages, academic papers, books, and code). The cleaning process included tasks such as text extraction and parsing from raw HTML/PDF files, deduplication, rule-based filtering, and the removal of toxic or undesirable content. Furthermore, we established a robust quality assessment framework comprising 10 categories and over 300 quality evaluation metrics. This framework enables us to systematically categorize datasets into quality tiers, which serve as a foundation for further refinement and the informed selection of training data.
items.zh: 数据整理。本研究中使用的原始数据大部分来自公开来源，包括Common Crawl（CC）、编程平台和百科全书。然而，这些来源通常存在一系列质量问题。为此，我们针对不同数据类型（如网页、学术论文、书籍和代码）的特点开发了专门的数据清洗管道。清洗过程包括从原始HTML/PDF文件中提取和解析文本、去重、基于规则的过滤以及去除有毒或不良内容。此外，我们建立了一个包含10个类别和超过300个质量评估指标的稳健质量评估框架。该框架使我们能够系统地将数据集分类为质量等级，为后续精炼和训练数据的明智选择奠定基础。

items.en: High-quality data selection. To identify high-quality data, we fine-tuned models such as fastText Bojanowski et al. (2017) and BERT Devlin et al. (2019), applying fine-grained labels and attributes to the cleaned data. These attributes include metrics such as text coherence, knowledge density, educational level, and complexity. Using this approach, we were able to extract high-quality data samples from the broader dataset. Additionally, sampling experiments were conducted across various features to identify optimal strategies for data selection. This process ensured that the selected data were well-suited for enhancing downstream model performance.
items.zh: 高质量数据选择。为识别高质量数据，我们对fastText Bojanowski et al. (2017)和BERT Devlin et al. (2019)等模型进行了微调，对清洗后的数据应用细粒度标签和属性。这些属性包括文本连贯性、知识密度、教育水平和复杂度等指标。通过这种方法，我们能够从更广泛的数据集中提取高质量数据样本。此外，我们在各种特征上进行了采样实验，以确定最佳的数据选择策略。这一过程确保了所选数据非常适合提升下游模型性能。

items.en: Mathematics and code data. Informed by prior research Shao et al. (2024), we curated a large-scale dataset focused on programming and mathematical reasoning. The data collection process leveraged publicly available repositories such as Common Crawl and GitHub. To ensure the quality and relevance of the mathematics and code data, we developed advanced filtering models based on fastText and BERT. These models were employed to identify and retrieve content containing high-quality programming and mathematical reasoning, enabling the incorporation of specialized knowledge into the corpus.
items.zh: 数学与代码数据。受先前研究Shao et al. (2024)启发，我们整理了一个专注于编程和数学推理的大规模数据集。数据收集过程利用了Common Crawl和GitHub等公开仓库。为确保数学和代码数据的质量和相关性，我们开发了基于fastText和BERT的高级过滤模型。这些模型用于识别和检索包含高质量编程和数学推理的内容，从而将专业知识纳入语料库。

items.en: Data ablation and mixture. Building on insights from earlier studies DeepSeek-AI et al. (2024), we employed a continued-training strategy to assess the contribution of newly integrated datasets to the overall model performance. This process was conducted on smaller models to validate the utility of the new data prior to full-scale implementation. Additionally, our data mixing strategy prioritized diversity and ensured balanced distributions across different data attributes. Particular attention was given to optimizing sampling strategies for critical data types, such as reasoning-related content. The effectiveness of these strategies was further validated on larger models, demonstrating their impact on enhancing training outcomes.
items.zh: 数据消融与混合。基于早期研究DeepSeek-AI等人（2024）的见解，我们采用了一种持续训练策略来评估新整合数据集对整体模型性能的贡献。该过程在较小模型上进行，以在全规模实施前验证新数据的效用。此外，我们的数据混合策略优先考虑多样性，并确保不同数据属性之间的平衡分布。特别关注优化关键数据类型（如推理相关内容）的采样策略。这些策略的有效性在更大模型上得到进一步验证，展示了它们对提升训练效果的影响。

items.en: In contrast to conventional dense architectures, the MoE paradigm replaces standard FeedForward Networks (FFNs) with a collection of NN experts Fedus et al. (2022); Lepikhin et al. (2020); Jiang et al. (2024), which are compact and modular FFN units. This design enables greater efficiency (shown in the following subsection 3.3) and specialization within LLMs. The core mechanism of MoE is the dynamic routing of tokens to specific experts through an individual router, R\mathrm{R}, for each token. This routing facilitates highly optimized and selective computation, as defined by the following equations:
items.zh: 与传统的密集架构不同，MoE范式用一组N个专家（Fedus等人，2022；Lepikhin等人，2020；Jiang等人，2024）替代了标准的前馈网络（FFN），这些专家是紧凑且模块化的FFN单元。这种设计使得大型语言模型（LLM）具有更高的效率（如下文第3.3节所示）和专业化能力。MoE的核心机制是通过一个独立的路由器R为每个token动态路由到特定专家。这种路由实现了高度优化和选择性的计算，由以下方程定义：

items.en: where 𝐡t∈ℝd\mathbf{h}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{d} is the dd-dimensional FFNs input of the tt-th token, Ei\mathrm{E}_{i} is the ii-th expert in total NN experts, 𝐩∈ℝN\mathbf{p}\in\mathbb{R}^{N} denote the gates for expert selection, and 𝐨t∈ℝd\mathbf{o}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{d} denotes the output of the tt-th token after being processed by routing experts. Next, we will elaborate Ling’s architectural innovations on the above MoE framework.
items.zh: 其中，h_t ∈ ℝ^d是第t个token的d维FFN输入，E_i是总共N个专家中的第i个专家，p ∈ ℝ^N表示用于专家选择的门控，o_t ∈ ℝ^d表示第t个token经过路由专家处理后的输出。接下来，我们将详细阐述Ling在上述MoE框架上的架构创新。

items.en: To enhance the advantages of the MoE architecture over traditional dense models, while simultaneously improving training efficiency and scalability, the Ling models adopt a fine-grained expert strategy Dai et al. (2024); DeepSeek-AI (2024b). Specifically, compared to the original expert design, our approach scales the number of experts while proportionally reducing the intermediate size of each expert, thus maintaining the equivalent total capacity. This design promotes a higher degree of specialization among experts, allowing the model to encapsulate a wider and more diverse range of knowledge.
items.zh: 为了增强MoE架构相对于传统密集模型的优势，同时提高训练效率和可扩展性，Ling模型采用了细粒度专家策略（Dai等人，2024；DeepSeek-AI，2024b）。具体来说，与原始专家设计相比，我们的方法在增加专家数量的同时，按比例减小每个专家的中间大小，从而保持总容量等效。这种设计促进了专家之间更高程度的专业化，使模型能够封装更广泛、更多样化的知识。

items.en: Nevertheless, solely relying on fine-grained experts poses a potential challenge, i.e., individual experts may struggle to simultaneously develop both general and specialized capabilities under constrained capacity. This limitation may incentivize experts to prioritize improving general capabilities over specialized ones, which contradicts the design intent of the fine-grained experts. To address this, we introduce an additional share expert that can utilize all tokens for training without the need of routing Rajbhandari et al. (2022); Dai et al. (2024) to provide general ability. The final output 𝐨t′\mathbf{o}_{t}^{\prime} of the MoE FFNs can be represented as follows:
items.zh: 然而，仅依赖细粒度专家会带来一个潜在挑战，即单个专家可能难以在有限容量下同时发展通用和专用能力。这种限制可能促使专家优先提升通用能力而非专用能力，这与细粒度专家的设计意图相悖。为解决此问题，我们引入了一个额外的共享专家，该专家可以利用所有token进行训练，无需路由（Rajbhandari等人，2022；Dai等人，2024），以提供通用能力。MoE FFN的最终输出o_t'可以表示为：

items.en: Routing in MoE-based LLMs can generally be categorized into two approaches: token-drop and dropless. To ensure the efficient utilization of training data, we adopt a dropless strategy in our implementation. Additionally, we incorporate two key mechanisms, i.e., load balance loss and router z-loss, to enhance training efficiency and to prevent imbalances in the distribution of tokens across experts.
items.zh: 基于MoE的LLM中的路由通常可分为两种方法：token丢弃和无丢弃。为确保训练数据的有效利用，我们在实现中采用了无丢弃策略。此外，我们引入了两个关键机制，即负载均衡损失和路由器z-loss，以提高训练效率并防止token在专家间分布不均。

items.en: Meanwhile, to mitigate the instability issue during the early stage of pretraining, we propose a Stochastic Routing Warmup mechanism. Unlike conventional load-balancing losses or manual interventions, this method introduces controlled randomness into the routing module to prevent expert overload, and further prevent the experts from collapsing due to routing imbalance during the early training stage. Let 𝐬t∈ℝN\mathbf{s}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{N} denote the raw routing logits for input token tt, computed by a linear projection layer. During the warmup phase (global step i≤Wi\leq W), we interpolate between learned logits and synthesized random logits. The final routing logits s^t\hat{s}_{t}are computed as:
items.zh: 同时，为缓解预训练早期阶段的不稳定性问题，我们提出了一种随机路由预热机制。与传统的负载均衡损失或手动干预不同，该方法在路由模块中引入受控随机性，以防止专家过载，并进一步防止在训练早期阶段因路由不平衡导致专家崩溃。设s_t ∈ ℝ^N为输入token t的原始路由logits，由线性投影层计算。在预热阶段（全局步数i ≤ W），我们在学习到的logits和合成的随机logits之间进行插值。最终路由logits ŝ_t计算如下：

items.en: where μs\mu_{s} and σs\sigma_{s} represent the running mean and standard deviation of 𝐬t\mathbf{s}_{t}. The router warmup ensures balanced expert activation at initialization while gradually shifting control to the learned routing distribution, effectively mitigating out-of-memory risks and stabilizing training process.
items.zh: 其中μ_s和σ_s分别表示s_t的运行均值和标准差。路由器预热确保了初始化时专家激活的平衡，同时逐渐将控制权转移到学习到的路由分布，有效缓解了内存溢出风险并稳定了训练过程。

items.en: Compared to dense architectures, MoE-based models exhibit increased training complexity and significantly reduced stability, which can lead to fluctuations in loss values and hinder convergence. During our preliminary experiments, we observed that the output norm of the LM-Head often becomes unstable, particularly during loss spikes. This instability can negatively impact both the convergence and the overall performance of the model. To address this issue, we involve a Normed LM-Head (NormHead) for token prediction Yang et al. (2023). In this approach, the weight of the LM-Head, i.e., 𝐖l​m​_​h​e​a​d\mathbf{W}_{lm\_head} are subjected to L2 normalization before being applied for the token prediction. The formulation is as follows:
items.zh: 与密集架构相比，基于MoE的模型训练复杂度增加，稳定性显著降低，这可能导致损失值波动并阻碍收敛。在我们的初步实验中，我们观察到LM-Head的输出范数经常变得不稳定，特别是在损失尖峰期间。这种不稳定性可能对模型的收敛和整体性能产生负面影响。为解决此问题，我们引入了归一化LM-Head（NormHead）用于token预测（Yang等人，2023）。在该方法中，LM-Head的权重W_lm_head在用于token预测之前经过L2归一化。公式如下：

items.en: where 𝐡\mathbf{h} represents the input to the LM-Head, and 𝐡o\mathbf{h}_{o} is the normalized output. By normalizing the weights, the NormHead ensures that variations in weight magnitude do not contribute to instability, particularly in scenarios involving large gradients or fluctuating loss values. Our empirical experiments indicate that NormHead significantly enhances the stability of training.
items.zh: 其中h表示LM-Head的输入，h_o是归一化后的输出。通过归一化权重，NormHead确保权重幅度的变化不会导致不稳定性，特别是在涉及大梯度或损失值波动的情况下。我们的实证实验表明，NormHead显著增强了训练的稳定性。

items.en: As a foundational principle, scaling laws provide valuable predictive insights into the behavior of LLMs as model capacity and data volume increase. These scaling laws can serve as a framework for comparing different LLM architectures and guiding the training of hundred-billion-parameter LLMs. The existing studies Kaplan et al. (2020); Hoffmann et al. (2022); Henighan et al. (2020) have extensively investigated scaling laws in the context of dense LLMs, whereas some subsequent works Gao et al. (2024); Clark et al. (2022) have initiated discussions on the scaling laws for MoE models. However, there remains a significant gap in the systematic exploration of scaling laws for MoE architectures.
items.zh: 作为基本原则，缩放定律为LLM在模型容量和数据量增加时的行为提供了有价值的预测性见解。这些缩放定律可以作为比较不同LLM架构和指导千亿参数LLM训练的框架。现有研究（Kaplan等人，2020；Hoffmann等人，2022；Henighan等人，2020）已广泛研究了密集LLM背景下的缩放定律，而一些后续工作（Gao等人，2024；Clark等人，2022）开始讨论MoE模型的缩放定律。然而，在MoE架构缩放定律的系统探索方面仍存在显著空白。

items.en: In developing the MoE architecture for the Ling models, we conducted a systematic analysis of its scaling behavior with respect to two critical hyper-parameters: batch size and learning rate. Additionally, we evaluated its overall performance by examining validation loss. Using the scaling law of loss as a framework, we compared the MoE and dense architectures, uncovering insights into the scaling behavior and effectiveness of MoE models.
items.zh: 在开发Ling模型的MoE架构时，我们对其相对于两个关键超参数（批量大小和学习率）的缩放行为进行了系统分析。此外，我们通过检查验证损失来评估其整体性能。以损失缩放定律为框架，我们比较了MoE和密集架构，揭示了MoE模型的缩放行为及其有效性的见解。

items.en: To optimize model performance across varying compute budgets, it is essential to first determine the optimal batch size and learning rate for different model sizes and data scales. To achieve this, we aligned the MoE architecture with Ling-Plus during scaling law experiments to minimize variability in the factors influencing model performance. We then performed a grid search over batch size and learning rate in the context of small-scale MoE model training, with compute budgets spanning a range from 1​e181e^{18} to 6​e206e^{20}. This systematic exploration enabled us to identify configurations that maximize the efficiency and performance of the models under differing computational constraints.
items.zh: 为了在不同算力预算下优化模型性能，首先需要确定不同模型大小和数据规模下的最优批量大小和学习率。为此，我们在缩放定律实验中将MoE架构与Ling-Plus对齐，以最小化影响模型性能的因素的变异性。然后，我们在小规模MoE模型训练中对批量大小和学习率进行网格搜索，算力预算范围从1e18到6e20。这一系统探索使我们能够识别出在不同计算约束下最大化模型效率和性能的配置。

items.en: Subsequently, we modeled the power law relationship between batch size (BB) and learning rate (η\eta) with respect to the compute budget (𝒞\mathcal{C}). The results are illustrated in Figure 12 and provide insights into how these hyper-parameters scale under varying computational constraints.
items.zh: 随后，我们建立了批量大小B和学习率η相对于算力预算C的幂律关系模型。结果如图12所示，提供了这些超参数在不同计算约束下如何缩放的见解。

items.en: The fitted results indicate that the scaling behaviors of batch size (BB) and learning rate (η\eta) for MoE models are consistent with those observed in dense models, aligning with findings from previous work DeepSeek-AI (2024a). Furthermore, we adjusted the MoE architecture, specifically the number of routed and shared experts, to achieve varying degrees of sparsity, ranging from 4.6% to 12.1%. In addition, we tuned the weighting of auxiliary loss components, such as balance loss and z-loss, to evaluate their potential impact.
items.zh: 拟合结果表明，MoE模型的批量大小B和学习率η的缩放行为与密集模型一致，与先前工作DeepSeek-AI（2024a）的发现相符。此外，我们调整了MoE架构，特别是路由专家和共享专家的数量，以实现不同程度的稀疏性，范围从4.6%到12.1%。同时，我们调整了辅助损失组件（如平衡损失和z-loss）的权重，以评估其潜在影响。

items.en: Our analysis revealed that, for a given compute budget, neither the MoE architecture nor the auxiliary loss functions had any significant influence on the optimal batch size and learning rate. Instead, the optimal configuration of these two hyper-parameters was found to be primarily determined by the compute budget. This observation underscores the compute budget as the dominant factor in hyper-parameter tuning for MoE training.
items.zh: 我们的分析表明，对于给定的算力预算，MoE架构和辅助损失函数对最优批量大小和学习率均无显著影响。相反，这两个超参数的最优配置主要由算力预算决定。这一观察强调了算力预算是MoE训练中超参数调整的主导因素。

items.en: One of the critical questions surrounding the MoE architecture is its efficiency relative to dense architectures. To address this, we define the efficiency lever of MoE compared to dense models as the ratio of compute budgets required for each architecture to train a sufficiently large model that achieves the same level of training loss. To evaluate this, we selected a range of compute budgets spanning from 1​e181e^{18} to 3​e203e^{20} and conducted small-scale training experiments for both MoE and dense models. For each compute budget, we collected the results corresponding to the optimal training loss and subsequently fit a logarithmic inverse FLOPs-to-Loss curve for both MoE and dense architectures, respectively. This approach enabled a systematic comparison of the training efficiency between the two architectures.
items.zh: 围绕MoE架构的一个关键问题是其相对于密集架构的效率。为此，我们将MoE相对于密集模型的效率杠杆定义为每种架构训练一个达到相同训练损失水平的足够大模型所需的算力预算之比。为评估这一点，我们选择了一系列算力预算，范围从1e18到3e20，并对MoE和密集模型进行了小规模训练实验。对于每个算力预算，我们收集了对应最优训练损失的结果，然后分别对MoE和密集架构拟合了对数逆FLOPs-损失曲线。这种方法使得两种架构之间的训练效率得以系统比较。

items.en: As evidenced in Figure 13, MoE architecture consistently achieves lower training loss than the dense architecture under equivalent compute budgets. The average efficiency lever is approximately 3x, meaning that the MoE architecture is about 3 times more efficient than the dense architecture in terms of compute required to achieve the same performance. Interestingly, we observed that the efficiency lever increases as the compute budget grows. For example, at 1​e211e^{21} FLOPs, the efficiency lever is approximately 3, whereas at 1​e241e^{24} FLOPs, the efficiency lever exceeds 3.5. This trend suggests that MoE architectures exhibit increasing advantages over dense architectures as the compute budget scales up, reinforcing their potential for large-scale applications. The enhanced scalability implies that MoE architectures, such as Ling, could become even more powerful and efficient when applied to massive-scale models, providing significant benefits in terms of resource utilization and performance at higher compute budgets. As models continue to scale, these efficiency gains highlight the promise of MoE as a highly scalable and cost-effective alternative to dense architectures.
items.zh: 如图13所示，在同等算力预算下，MoE架构始终比密集架构实现更低的训练损失。平均效率杠杆约为3倍，这意味着在达到相同性能所需的算力方面，MoE架构的效率大约是密集架构的3倍。有趣的是，我们观察到效率杠杆随着算力预算的增加而增大。例如，在1e21 FLOPs时，效率杠杆约为3，而在1e24 FLOPs时，效率杠杆超过3.5。这一趋势表明，随着算力预算的扩大，MoE架构相对于密集架构的优势日益增强，进一步巩固了其在大规模应用中的潜力。增强的可扩展性意味着，像Ling这样的MoE架构在应用于大规模模型时可能变得更加强大和高效，在更高的算力预算下为资源利用和性能带来显著优势。随着模型不断扩展，这些效率提升凸显了MoE作为密集架构的高度可扩展且经济高效的替代方案的潜力。

items.en: We pre-train Ling-Plus using the AdamW optimizer with the following hyper-parameters: β1=0.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.95\beta_{2}=0.95, ϵ=1​e−8\epsilon=1e^{-8}, and weight_decay = 0.1. We adopt a warmup-and-stable-decay learning rate schedule, with a maximum learning rate of 2.4​e−42.4e^{-4}. The learning rate is linearly warmed up from 0 to the maximum value over the first 2K training steps. Afterward, it is halved once approximately 60% of the training tokens are processed.
items.zh: 我们使用AdamW优化器预训练Ling-Plus，超参数如下：β1=0.9，β2=0.95，ϵ=1e-8，weight_decay=0.1。我们采用预热后稳定衰减的学习率调度，最大学习率为2.4e-4。学习率在前2K训练步中从0线性预热到最大值。之后，在约60%的训练token被处理时，学习率减半一次。

items.en: We also implement a batch size warmup strategy, starting from an initial batch size of 2,560. The batch size gradually increases to a maximum of 8,960 and remains at this maximum for the remainder of training. The gradient clipping norm is set to 1.0, and the maximum sequence length is fixed at 4K tokens. For the first stage of pre-training, we train on a total of 9T tokens. The load-balancing loss coefficient is set to 0.0150.015, and the z-loss coefficient is set to 1​e−41e^{-4}. We do not employ the token-dropping strategy during training.
items.zh: 我们还实施了批量大小预热策略，从初始批量大小2,560开始。批量大小逐渐增加到最大值8,960，并在剩余训练中保持该最大值。梯度裁剪范数设置为1.0，最大序列长度固定为4K token。在预训练的第一阶段，我们总共训练了9T token。负载均衡损失系数设置为0.015，z-loss系数设置为1e-4。我们在训练过程中未采用token丢弃策略。

items.en: Throughout the training process, we continuously monitor various indicators such as training loss, gradients, router token distribution, and benchmark scores to ensure that the model is learning effectively and consistently. We also perform several adjustments to the pre-training data mix to enhance model performance. During each adjustment, we increase the proportion of high-quality data while removing samples where the loss fails to decrease. To mitigate the risk of duplicate samples during these adjustments, we employ sample-level online data deduplication, ensuring the uniqueness of training data during the mixing process. These techniques and strategies collectively aim to optimize the pre-training process, ensuring robust model performance while maintaining training stability and data quality.
items.zh: 在整个训练过程中，我们持续监控各种指标，如训练损失、梯度、路由器token分布和基准分数，以确保模型有效且一致地学习。我们还对预训练数据混合进行了几次调整，以提升模型性能。每次调整中，我们增加高质量数据的比例，同时移除损失未能下降的样本。为减轻这些调整中重复样本的风险，我们采用了样本级在线数据去重，确保混合过程中训练数据的唯一性。这些技术和策略共同旨在优化预训练过程，确保模型性能稳健，同时保持训练稳定性和数据质量。

items.en: During this phase of pre-training, the maximum input sequence length was extended to 16K tokens. This extension was achieved using Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE), with θ\theta parameter adjusted from 10K to 600K to support longer sequences. Adjustments were also made to the training dataset to better align with the objectives of long-context processing. For the Ling-Plus model, the proportion of web-derived data was reduced, and additional long-form text data were incorporated to improve the model’s ability to process extended sequences. Similarly, for the Ling-Lite model, the amount of web-based data was scaled down, while the proportion of mathematical and coding-related corpora was increased. The learning rate schedule remained consistent with the prior training stage, and a total of 150B tokens were processed during this phase to enhance the model’s long-context processing capabilities.
items.zh: 在此预训练阶段，最大输入序列长度扩展至16K token。这一扩展通过旋转位置编码（RoPE）实现，θ参数从10K调整至600K以支持更长的序列。还对训练数据集进行了调整，以更好地契合长上下文处理的目标。对于Ling-Plus模型，减少了网络衍生数据的比例，并加入了额外的长文本数据，以提升模型处理扩展序列的能力。类似地，对于Ling-Lite模型，缩减了网络数据的数量，同时增加了数学和编程相关语料的比例。学习率调度与前一训练阶段保持一致，此阶段共处理了150B token，以增强模型的长上下文处理能力。

items.en: During the final phase of pre-training, the inverse square root decay schedule was employed to systematically reduce the learning rate from 1.2​e−41.2e^{-4} to 1.2​e−81.2e^{-8}. To maintain the effectiveness of this phase, the annealing process was conducted exclusively using clean, meticulously curated, high-quality datasets.
items.zh: 在预训练的最后阶段，采用逆平方根衰减调度，将学习率从1.2e-4系统性地降低至1.2e-8。为保持此阶段的有效性，退火过程仅使用经过精心筛选的高质量数据集进行。

items.en: During pre-training, the phenomenon where the loss abruptly rises and then falls is referred to as loss spikes. These abrupt changes are typically triggered by specific interactions between the data and optimizer states. Loss spikes can be classified into two types: (1) narrow spikes, which last for only a few steps and have minimal impact on model performance, and (2) wide spikes, which persist across more steps and can significantly disrupt model stability, sometimes even causing benchmark evaluation results to approach random levels. Our research shows that it is difficult to completely eliminate loss spikes. To mitigate their effects, we have designed a series of strategies, including skip loss spikes and sample retry mechanism. When a loss spike is detected, the affected update is skipped, and the associated data is randomly re-injected into subsequent training batches. If the spike persists, we automatically reduce the learning rate during the affected step. This approach has proven effective in reducing the negative impact of loss spikes, enabling consistent improvements in benchmark metrics throughout the training process. Figure 14 intuitively illustrates the improvement in train loss achieved by the proposed strategy.
items.zh: 在预训练过程中，损失突然上升然后下降的现象称为损失尖峰。这些突变通常由数据和优化器状态之间的特定交互触发。损失尖峰可分为两类：（1）窄尖峰，仅持续几步，对模型性能影响极小；（2）宽尖峰，持续更多步，可能严重破坏模型稳定性，有时甚至导致基准评估结果接近随机水平。我们的研究表明，完全消除损失尖峰是困难的。为减轻其影响，我们设计了一系列策略，包括跳过损失尖峰和样本重试机制。当检测到损失尖峰时，跳过受影响的更新，并将相关数据随机重新注入后续训练批次。如果尖峰持续存在，我们会在受影响的步骤自动降低学习率。该方法已被证明能有效减少损失尖峰的负面影响，使训练过程中基准指标持续改善。图14直观展示了所提策略在训练损失上的改进。

items.capEn: Figure 15: Illustration of our post-training modeling and dataset curation pipeline.
items.capZh: 图15：我们的后训练建模和数据集整理流程示意图。

items.en: As depicted in Figure 15, following the pre-training phase, the development of the Ling model involves a dual-stage alignment process: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) Ouyang et al. (2022) and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) Rafailov et al. (2023). This alignment process adopts an iterative framework to progressively enhance both the dataset and the model’s capabilities. Specifically, after each training cycle, the best-performing model from prior iterations is leveraged to refine the SFT and preference data, thereby informing and improving subsequent training phases. In the following sections, we provide a detailed overview of our SFT data curation process (see Section 4.1), the DPO methodology (see Section 4.2), as well as the post-training techniques employed for long-text generation (see Section 4.3) and tool use (see Section 4.4). Additionally, the complete post-training pipelines and configurations, tailored for various computing platforms, will be made publicly available through our code repository.
items.zh: 如图15所示，在预训练阶段之后，Ling模型的开发涉及一个两阶段对齐过程：监督微调（SFT）Ouyang等人（2022）和直接偏好优化（DPO）Rafailov等人（2023）。该对齐过程采用迭代框架，逐步提升数据集和模型能力。具体而言，在每个训练周期后，利用先前迭代中表现最佳的模型来优化SFT和偏好数据，从而为后续训练阶段提供信息并加以改进。在以下章节中，我们详细介绍了SFT数据整理流程（见第4.1节）、DPO方法（见第4.2节），以及用于长文本生成（见第4.3节）和工具使用（见第4.4节）的后训练技术。此外，针对不同计算平台定制的完整后训练流程和配置将通过我们的代码仓库公开提供。

items.en: Data serves as the cornerstone of the supervised fine-tuning (SFT) stage, with synthetic data assuming an increasingly significant role. This shift is driven by the diminishing availability of human-generated data and the substantial costs associated with its annotation, both in terms of time and labor. Our SFT dataset is constructed from an initial seed dataset consisting of one to two million instances derived from a combination of human annotations and open-source resources. This dataset is subsequently scaled by a substantial factor through the application of data synthesis techniques. In the following, we detail the measures implemented to ensure the quality and diversity of the synthetic data, which are critical to the success of the fine-tuning process.
items.zh: 数据是监督微调（SFT）阶段的基石，其中合成数据扮演着越来越重要的角色。这一转变是由于人类生成数据的可用性减少以及其标注在时间和人力上的高昂成本所驱动的。我们的SFT数据集由一个初始种子数据集构建而成，该数据集包含一到两百万个实例，来源于人工标注和开源资源的组合。随后，通过应用数据合成技术，该数据集被大幅扩展。在下文中，我们详细介绍了为确保合成数据质量和多样性而采取的措施，这些措施对微调过程的成功至关重要。

items.en: Our data synthesis process leverages methodologies inspired by Magpie-like approaches Xu et al. (2024) and OSS-Instruct Wei et al. (2023) to generate novel problem prompts. Following this, we applied the rejection sampling (RS) technique, as outlined in Dubey et al. (2024), to produce candidate responses. To ensure high-quality outputs, we established a dedicated pipeline designed to select the most optimal responses, with specific tailoring for reasoning and non-reasoning datasets. This targeted approach ensures that the synthesized data aligns with the desired quality standards while addressing the diverse requirements of different data types.
items.zh: 我们的数据合成过程借鉴了Magpie类方法Xu等人（2024）和OSS-Instruct Wei等人（2023）的方法来生成新颖的问题提示。之后，我们应用了Dubey等人（2024）中概述的拒绝采样（RS）技术来生成候选回答。为确保高质量输出，我们建立了一个专用流程，旨在选择最优回答，并针对推理和非推理数据集进行了特定定制。这种有针对性的方法确保了合成数据符合所需的质量标准，同时满足不同数据类型的不同要求。

items.en: For reasoning data, such as code, math, and logical reasoning, we implemented a series of rule-based filtering mechanisms to ensure high-quality data:
items.zh: 对于推理数据，如代码、数学和逻辑推理，我们实施了一系列基于规则的过滤机制以确保高质量数据：

items.en: Code data. A comprehensive multi-stage validation process was developed, which involves: (1) extracting and verifying code through rule-based checks and execution tests, (2) generating synthetic test cases using advanced LLMs, and (3) retaining only those code solutions that successfully pass all stages of verification.
items.zh: 代码数据。开发了一个全面的多阶段验证过程，包括：（1）通过基于规则的检查和执行测试提取并验证代码，（2）使用先进的大语言模型生成合成测试用例，（3）仅保留成功通过所有验证阶段的代码解决方案。

items.en: Math data. We prompted LLMs to translate computational logic into executable Python code, enabling the execution of the code to verify both the final answers and intermediate reasoning steps. This ensures accuracy throughout the problem-solving process.
items.zh: 数学数据。我们提示大语言模型将计算逻辑转换为可执行的Python代码，从而能够执行代码以验证最终答案和中间推理步骤。这确保了问题解决过程的准确性。

items.en: Logical reasoning data. A majority voting system was employed to achieve consensus-based selection of the best solutions. This approach helps identify the most accurate logical conclusions by aggregating multiple perspectives to ensure reliability.
items.zh: 逻辑推理数据。采用多数投票系统，基于共识选择最佳解决方案。这种方法通过聚合多个视角以确保可靠性，有助于识别最准确的逻辑结论。

items.en: Our empirical analysis indicates that these rule-based methods effectively eliminated a significant number of incorrect responses while minimizing the exclusion of correct ones, thus maintaining dataset integrity.
